candidate_triples.justification: The text states that James Llewellyn "Jimmy" Frise is the author of Life's Little Comedies.

provenance.snippet: The Canadian cartoonist James Llewellyn " Jimmy " Frise ( , 16 October 1891 – 13 June 1948 ) is best known for his work on the comic strip Birdseye and his illustrations of humorous prose pieces by Greg Clark .
